concerns.text: SC-011 (ANOVA tests) is not linked in Computational Task Ordering Step 5 (Regression Modeling Phase). Spec requires ANOVA for group differences; plan only links SC-002.
SC-005 (Retry logic verification) is not linked in Computational Task Ordering Step 1 (Data Download Phase). Spec requires verification on simulated failures; plan only links FR-001/FR-010.
SC-008 requires a validation script for tie-breaking rules. Project Structure lists tie_breaking_rules.md but no script (e.g., validate_tie_breaking.py) in code/ or docs/reproducibility/.
